feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query – Mass Maintenance of Storage Location Addresses in SAP
entry.content:
We have a business requirement to maintain/update addresses for approximately 500 storage locations in SAP.

Since maintaining the address manually for each storage location would be time-consuming and prone to errors, kindly suggest the best approach for mass maintenance/upload of storage location addresses.

entry.title: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD
entry.content: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD

entry.title: Official ABAP MCP Server for AI Integration
entry.content:
Currently we're doing analysis and testing in integrating ABAP MCP on Eclipse to connect to our sandbox system.
It seems that the MCP server offered SAP is limited since AI cant edit existing object (although we can create new one).

I have tried community MCP server and it was able to do it. are there any way ABAP MCP tool for editing can be enabled?
was it disabled in purpose to prevent premature / accidental damage to existing objects.

entry.title: The InfoSet ZHR2_XJ_PA_ADHOC is not being generated in transaction SQ02.
entry.content:
During the InfoSet generation process, the system checks the TRDIR table for the following entry:

  • NAME = AQIO==ZHR2_XJ_PA_ADHOC
  • SUBC = 1

However, no corresponding entry exists in the TRDIR table for this combination. As a result, the generation process does not proceed further, and the InfoSet is not generated.

entry.title: ME55 - Deleted Line Item Value Not Updated to Zero in Purchase requisition.
entry.content:
Component- MM-PUR-REQ

After the line item deleted from ME52N, PR value does not change to Zero and total value showing same as before.

entry.title: User unable to move the stock to unrestricted stock.
entry.content:
User unable to perform QA11 getting error “Change the inspection stock of material 3305-01-026 in QM only”

Steps performed by user:

  • Created PR
  • Created PO w.r.t to PR
  • QA11 posted mistakenly for 553 movement type.
  • To reverse the 553-user posted 554 through MB11.

 

Now user is trying to post QA11 to get the material in unrestricted stock but facing above error.

entry.title: SLT replication after the export/import of SAP SLT system
entry.content:
SLT replication after the export/import of SAP SLT system.

What are the steps needed to replicate the tabales after the migration of SAP SLT SYSTEM without doing the full load/initial

entry.title: Vendor is not selected based on the Fixed vendor check box in the source List
entry.content: Source list has multiple active vendors within the same validity periods with MRP relevance = 1 for both vendors and Fixed vendor check box is ticked for one vendor. Expectation is that when the MRP creates the Purchase requisitions, it picks the vendor which has fixed indicator checked. But MRP is not following this logic.

entry.title: Input must be in the format ___.___.__~,__V
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Hope you are doing great!

We are creating sales order using inbound idoc, IDOC is failing with error status 51 with error: Input must be in the format ___.___.__~,__V

When we run in foreground its getting struck at Sales order Condition screen where condition type is not getting picked. Due to which idoc is failing and may be its checking Value format and finally throwing the error message in subject. This is happening in Quality system MA1 CLNT 400.

Please find the screenshots for reference.

entry.title: DME Format Changes Is Not Reflecting as Expected
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We had a request from business to change the length of text generated in payment file for below field while performing F110 for RO1 company code, payment method - P, payment medium - Z_RO_CT

Under the DMEE tree the changes requested by user comes under node <Ustrd> where the request is to limit to 30 characters, currently the length is 140 characters.

Changed length to 30 

T-code - DMEE , Tree type - PAYM , Format Tree- Z_RO_CT
Z_RO_CT - Node path: PmtInf > CdtTrfTxInf >RmtInf >Ustrd

We made the required changes and tested so the characters generated in DME file will limit to 30 characters but it does not limit to 30 characters, as the format is created out of SAP standard note we request to check the issue and guide how can we limit to 30 characters for node <Ustrd>

entry.title: Optional Characteristics Missing from Inspection Instruction Printout (S/4HANA 2025)
entry.content:
Hi,

An inspection plan was created with operations containing both main and optional characteristics.

For the operations with optional characteristics, the sample was generated correctly and the inspection instruction was printed. However, these operations were not included in the printed output.

As it seems, the issue described above occurred after the upgrade to S/4HANA 2025.
If anyone has found a solution for printing optional characteristics, please let me know.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: KSH2 Kostenstellengruppen anlegen
entry.content:
KSH2 In der EHP6 öffnet sich ein Eingabefeld mit 5 Eingabemöglichkeiten.

In EHP8 ist dies dann nicht mehr möglich.

Hier kann nur noch eine Kostenstelle angelegt werden.

entry.title: Automatic output type message in ME21N
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

Good day!

Can you please help me with this issue in ME21N ,the field message is not automatically filling in. 

Also I already configured the NACE and MN04 the same of production environment and in PRD is working.

Can you please help me with this issue?

Attached the evidence

Regards,

entry.title: Packing in outbound cycle
entry.content:
Packing is the concept of packing the product to be delivered to customer with packaging material like a carton box.

CONFIG :

  1. Packagaing material group
  2. Packaging material type
  3. Assigning both mat group & mat type
  4. Delivery item cat get assigned with packaging assigned or not and of it is mandatory

PATH :

SPRO > LOGISTIC EXECUTION > SHIPPING > PACKING >

 

PACKING CONTROL BY ITEM CATEGORY :

Packing control by item cat -> BLANK BY DEFAULT so all item cat can be packed by standard

Can make mandatory here by selecting A.

 

DEFINE PACKAGING MATERIAL TYPE FOR SHIPPING :

 

DEFINE MATERIAL GROUP FOR PACKAGING MATERIAL

 

ALLOWED PACK MAT TYPE WITH PACK MAT GROUP 

 

The above config of allowed mat type for pack mat group is important.

MATERIAL MASTER :

 

Assign the packaging material group at basic data level or sales plant level .

Select the highlighted button below called pack for packing the material during Outbound delivery process.

 

SAP Supply Chain Management

entry.title: Inquiry on Rounding value issue during Partial Goods Receipt
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We would like to seek clarification regarding the system rounding logic during Goods Receipt posting, as we observed inconsistent rounding behavior which results in a discrepancy between the Goods Receipt amount and the Invoice amount.

 Observation

Based on the Goods Receipt quantity and PO unit price calculation:

7,025.200 × RM 4.32 = RM 30,348.864

However, the system updates the EKBE-DMBTR = RM 30,348.87

The system rounds the amount to RM 30,348.87.

 

Expected Result

We expected the amount to remain RM 30,348.86

 

Inquiry

Could you please clarify the following:

  1. Why does SAP round up RM 30,348.864 to RM 30,348.87 when updating EKBE-DMBTR?
  2. Which standard program, function module, or rounding routine performs this rounding?
  3. We have observed that in other test scenarios the system does not round the value in the same way. Could you explain under which conditions SAP rounds the amount and under which conditions it does not?

entry.title: Statement "COMMIT" is not allowed in this form in MR21
entry.content: Statement "COMMIT" is not allowed in this form in MR21

entry.title: Reprinting of PDF Documents with Original Data Excluding Master Data Changes
entry.content: Requirement: The system must support the reprinting of PDF documents (e.g., invoices, credit notes, Debit Notes) using the data as it existed at the time the document was originally created and posted.

entry.title: Issue in order settlement thorugh KO88
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

 Not able to  perform the settlement for the orders thorough KO88, as they relate to an asset fiscal year 2025 that has already been closed. You would like to know whether there is any option to execute the settlement process without reopening fiscal year 2025.

Please check and advise on this and do the needful.

Thank you,

Regards,

Narasimha

entry.title: Target actual cost variance is not matching with process order settlement amount
entry.content: In process order COR3 cost analysis when we are analyzing the cost of order, we noticed that Target actual cost variance amount is not matching with settlement amount that is the reason even after settlement of order we always see target actual variance have some available balance. Based on standard SAP practice it should be zero after settlement. Now can you please check and advice how we can correct it.

entry.title: Error AFABN
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are running t-code AFABN, but we have an error message AAPO191 for area 08 that has been created as an inflation area.

We have checked the configuration in AO90

The accounts area created for company code G235

Asset master date in AS03 is created correctly

Value created in AW01N has been created correctly, and depreciation is planned

We have check sap note
